violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth bucket sanitizing solutions were found at 0ppm during inspection. Quaternary ammonia solutions should be maintained at 200-400ppm, per manufacturer directions.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Expired bucket of macaroni salad was found in the front refrigerated prep table. Expired food items should be discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Refrigerated equipment throughout the kitchen was found dirty, inside and out. Wire shelving in the walk-in cooler and throughout the kitchen were also found dirty. Cupboards under the plate storage on the buffet lines and portable fan on the counter in the pizza prep area were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring found dirty throughout the kitchen and in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Floors should be cleaned and maintained clean. Ceiling vents were found dirty near the pizza oven. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Personal food and drink items were found on multiple prep tables in the kitchen. Personal items should be stored separate from items used for food service.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
